reference: Hello, my name is Jaya. I am suffering from Systemic Lupus Erythematosus for eighteen years. I am using Wysolone five milligrams, Hydroxychloroquine, and Calcium one thousand milligrams daily. At present, I am having avascular necrosis in both hips and losing my eyesight due to Hydroxychloroquine. My eye doctor asked me to stop Hydroxychloroquine and consider some other alternative medicine.
text: Hello, my name is Jaya. I am suffering from systemic lupus erythematosus for eighteen years. I am using mycophenolate five milligrams, hydroxychloroquine, and calcium one thousand milligrams daily. At present, I am having avascular necrosis in both hips and losing my eyesight due to hydroxychloroquine. My eye doctor asked me to stop hydroxychloroquine and consider some other alternative medicines.
